Great value I think for how nice the unit is and the accessories provided ($25.98 at time of review).

I wasn't expecting a lot from this trimmer as the price ($29.99 at time of review) seemed too good to be true.
Between the numerous accessories, cordless design and the charging mount, I figured there had to be some sort of balance.

What I found was that this trimmer delivered on EVERY front.

The attachments were easy to swap out and snapped into place firmly. The trimmer itself has a good solid feel to it and isn't too heavy. It's slim, so it's easy to hold for most everybody and the vibrations are minimal, which was one of the more surprising discoveries) and the clippers made clean, even and consistent cuts.

The battery life was surprising as well - I was able to trim my entire face 4 times prior to the battery becoming depleted. Charging was fast and the LED displayed the level of charge both during use and charging.  The charging stand is a low profile design and holds the trimmer vertically.

And as previously mentioned, the price is VERY low for everything you get - I recommend this to anyone who uses trimmers; it my not replace the more expensive models, but the value is off the charts and even if it isn't your main trimmer, it's great for travel.

I’ve gone through a few different trimmers over the years, but this 3-in-1 Electric Body Hair Trimmer is easily the most versatile one I’ve owned. Whether you're using it for manscaping or general grooming, it handles everything with ease.

Why It Stands Out:

Triple Threat Versatility: The interchangeable heads make this a total powerhouse. You get the ceramic blade head (perfect for the groin and body), a foil shaver head for a closer finish, and an ear and nose hair trimmer. It’s basically three tools in one.

Skin-Safe Tech: The ceramic blades are a game-changer. They stay cool and glide much smoother than steel, which means no nicks or snagging even in sensitive areas. It’s marketed as a "no nick" razor, and so far, it has lived up to that promise.

Wet & Dry Convenience: I love that it’s fully waterproof. Being able to use it as a wet/dry shaver means I can finish my grooming in the shower for an easy cleanup.

Battery & Display: The LED display is super helpful so you’re never caught off guard by a dead battery. It boasts about 90 minutes of runtime, and the wireless dock charging makes it look sleek on the bathroom counter while keeping it topped off.

Priced Right: For everything included in the box, it is priced very well.

The Verdict:

If you're looking for a reliable, all-in-one trimmer that works for both men and women (from face to bikini line), this is a solid investment. It’s sturdy, easy to clean, and the battery life is fantastic.

I have a "buzz cut" hair style and regularly cut my own hair at home.  Recently, I ordered a cordless hair trimmer and was impressed with how much easier it was to use vs. the corded variety of trimmers.  Until I saw this cordless trimmer, never thought of a separate trimmer for my other body hair.

This trimmer arrived fully charged and ready to go.  A convenient display indicates the percentage of battery power remaining.  Press the power button once and the trimmer comes to life.  Press the power button a second time and a handy LED light illuminates the area being trimmed.  Press the power button a third time and the trimmer and the LED light powers off.  Press and hold the power button for 3 seconds and the power button will "lock" to prevent inadvertently turning on in your travel luggage.  Press and hold for 3 seconds to "unlock."

The battery life is impressive, allowing several trimming sessions before needing to be placed in the included charging base.  The trimmer is light and nicely balanced, providing comfortable and confident control.  A variety of blade guards and attachments take care of all my body hair trimming needs...including nose hair.  I can't believe I used a corded trimmer for so many years when the cordless trimmers are so much easier!

This budget groomer is a good value, especially if you like to shave pretty close but not quite clean.  It has a charging cradle but it also charges directly via USB-C which is much better than proprietary chargers or using less common DC plugs.  It's small and lightweight enough to be a travel companion or your main razor at home.

While this doesn't get quite as close with no guard as some shavers, the most important thing is with no guard it doesn't pull or cut skin with the main razor attachment, it's smooth and easy to use.  The build quality is solid, it holds a charge for a long time and I appreciate the digital readout showing the state of charge.  It works great for a quick cleanup followed by detail work along the neckline with a razor.  The nose hair trimmer does work and doesn't pull, at least in my example.

There is some room for improvement in the design.  The LED light is a great idea but it doesn't actually seem to be that useful in my example, it's a little dim and usually I'm shaving in the bathroom with plenty of lighting.  The guards can be a little finicky to attach and difficult to remove.  Finally, the foil shaving attachment is let down by the addition of detail trimmers on either side, which (unlike the main cutter) does snag on hair in my example making it difficult to take advantage of the foil shaver's ability to get closer.

For the money, the trimmer itself is a decent value especially if you like some stubble or find that you generally just use one guard to trim a beard, but if you need a closer shave consider an alternative.

This trimmer set is a nifty all-in-one option for personal grooming. I wasn't sure what to expect when I ordered it and was a little concerned that it would feel cheap when it arrived. However, I was pleasantly surprised!

My husband has a different tool he uses that's from a more popular, well-known brand, and his trimmer and foil shaver are two separate tools. This product beats them out by providing both tools in one AND it's a much smaller, portable size. That's probably the feature I like the most about this product: it's big enough to be effective but small enough to be portable. (I just wish it came with some sort of carrying case to keep all the items and attachments together.)

As listed, the set does include the following:
- Cutting unit
- Charging dock
- USB charging cord (no charging block, unfortunately)
- Body trimmer head
- Foil shaver head
- Nose/ear hair trimmer head
- 1.5 - 10mm combs (3 different adjustable sizes)

The cutting unit features an LED panel that tells you how much battery life is left and whether or not the unit is locked for safety (another nice feature, especially if you have kids around). To trigger the lock, you hold the power button down for a few seconds, and you can unlock the device in the same way.

I was overall impressed with the quality of the items in this set: the cutting unit had some healthy weight to it and didn't feel flimsy or cheap. Same with the attachments and charging station - all the pieces felt well-constructed and durable. I think this unit could last for a while, dependent on battery performance. I *was* disappointed that the only charging option was a USB cable that didn't come with a charging block...I don't have USB outlets in my bathroom (of a relatively newer home) and had to scrounge around for an unused charging block in my junk drawer. If you don't have a charging block, you'll need to get one for this product.

All in all, I recommend this product as an efficient, all-in-one trimming solution. (Just get a storage case and charging block for convenience.)

I was pleasantly surprised when i received this shaving trimmer. This came in a nice box with good descriptions of the specs and well done design. Holding it in my hand, it has a quality feel and weight. The pieces fit into the body with a good solid snap and stay in place. The display is very nice showing you the battery life. I was not expecting to need the light feature but now I can't see going back to a trimmer without it! (like an impact driver / drill). Generally all the attachments trim satisfactorily and I will certainly be using this from now on.

Below I will go in depth into everything - but overall for the price, this is better than the cheaper aldi one i got a few years ago by far.

------

The trimmer comes with a few attachments - nose/ear, long hair trimmer / clipper with length guards, and a foil cutter with double clipppers on each side.

Trimmer body -

+ Nice weight and an nice matte finish.
+ The battery screen is a pleasing size and brightness and doesn't blind me.
= power button must be held for 3 seconds when you first use it to disable travel lock. First push engages trimmer, second push turns on light, third push turns both off. I had to get used to this, and found that i kept wanting to put my thumb where the button was and kept accidentally turning it on and off trying to hold the trimmer since it does not require much force to push the button. I am not sure there is another good place to put it though so now i am just getting used to it.
? It claims an IPx7 rating for water - i did not experiment with testing this

Battery -

+ was able to cut about 30 minutes total so far only getting down to about 85% using the light most of that time, so battery pretty decent.

Nose/Ear attachment -

+ This worked well for it's intended purpose and i was able to trim these areas easily

Hair clippers -

+ This worked nicely to do initial trim of long hair areas before using the foil shaver. It worked fine on eyebrows as well.
+ guards are a little difficult to remove but do work well and don't fall off.

Foil trimmer -

+ This works very nicely after the learning curve. I did not know how the side trimmers work and nicked myself quite a bit getting the hang of it. With some caution, this can be used with the light to get all those hard to reach areas going slow and keeping the skin tight.
Great right out of the box! Works great! Highly recommended!
Powerful waterproof trimmer with 4000K LED display, ideal for pubic, facial, and body hair, usable in wet or dry conditions. ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐✂️

I was pleasantly surprised by the quality of this trimmer. It is very light, easy to handle and, most importantly, does not jerk or irritate the skin, even in the most delicate areas. The battery lasts a long time and the design is very ergonomic. Definitely a great investment for personal care. I recommend it 100%!
Great quality, beautiful packaging and design. This does a fabulous job for maintaining body hair.

This body hair trimmer works really well. It’s easy to hold and trims smoothly without pulling hair. The wireless charging and LED display are very convenient, and the battery lasts a long time. I also like that it’s waterproof so it can be used wet or dry. Overall, a simple and effective trimmer.
To be honest, it's very practical and easy to use—it has absolutely no complexity. And what I really liked is that the battery doesn't drain quickly—that's a definite plus.

I’m honestly impressed with this body trimmer. The quality feels really good and it looks sleek and well made. It’s very easy to use and works smoothly without pulling, which I really appreciate.
The wireless charging and LED display are great features, and the battery lasts a long time. I also like that it’s waterproof, so it’s easy to clean and convenient to use. Overall, it’s a very practical grooming tool and better than I expected. Definitely happy with this purchase! ✨

I bought the product because it showed it can give a close shave. I used it on my face and it was not that close. It is as close as the ones I plug-in from the store that are cheaper. to me, it was a waste of money.
